ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name_of_company" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company is located */,
  "pincode" TEXT /* Pincode of the company's location */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the company */,
  "revenue_range" TEXT /* Revenue range of the company */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the contact belongs to */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "mobile" TEXT /* Mobile number of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the contact person */,
  "job_function" TEXT /* Job function of the contact person */,
  "assistant_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person's assistant */,
  "assistant_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person's assistant */,
  "assistant_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person's assistant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the interaction is with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., meeting, email, phone call) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the interaction */,
  "interaction_method" TEXT /* Method of interaction (e.g., phone, email, meeting) */,
  "interaction_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction (e.g., successful, unsuccessful, follow-up) */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up interactions */,
  "attachment" TEXT /* Attachments related to the interaction (e.g., files, images) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, marketing) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., admin, sales, marketing) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "reports_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_reports_to FOREIGN KEY ("reports_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., industry, location) */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_category_mapping" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "mapping_type" TEXT /* Type of mapping (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "category_id")
)
